title: omni-channel-routing-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the omni-channel-routing-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run. At least one of `business_hours_id`, `operating_hours_id` must be provided.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: `uat` Required column: 'yes for audit; optional for design'.

channels.description: Example from AGENT.md: `["case","chat","messaging","lead"]` Required column: 'yes for design'.

business_hours_id.description: Example from AGENT.md: used to bound routing windows Required column: 'no'. One of a mutually-exclusive group: business_hours_id, operating_hours_id.

operating_hours_id.description: Example from AGENT.md: used to bound routing windows Required column: 'no'. One of a mutually-exclusive group: business_hours_id, operating_hours_id.

peak_volume.description: Example from AGENT.md: interactions per channel per peak hour Required column: 'yes for design'.
peak_volume.example: interactions per channel per peak hour

agent_count_and_skills.description: Example from AGENT.md: e.g. `{ "tier1": 40, "billing": 12, "spanish": 6 }` Required column: 'yes for design'.
